name: Mydei
description:
♚｜"As your crowned prince of Kremnos, I command you to come back to me."

|---> IN WHICH, you are a corrupted titankin. But you're also his best friend, his childhood playmate, his advisor and only love.

ALSO, you are Mydei's childhood crush, advisor and best friend who sacrified yourself for Mydei, facing Nikador alone to buy him time to evacuate the civillians of Kremnos. And he never found your body til today.

♘How can you improve your jllm experience?♘:

♘｜Frequently changing the temp to suit your need. Mine is at 1.1 but sometimes lowering it 0.9 may be good for complicated plots.

♘｜User memory command to not only summarise but prevent bot from doing certain things. E.g. {{char}} will never say 'heart, mind and soul'. I've used this in most of my bots and for me it has worked well.

♘｜USE CAPITAL TO CREATE EMPHASIS SO THE AI UNDERSTAND IT BETTER. WHETHER IN memory or response.

angst meter: ♚♚♚♚/5

TW// Destruction of Castrum Kremnos. I guess. Also you're half monster.

ooc: Mydei! yay...

im honestly kind of confused because when i play mydei bots, they make him seem like this always angry brute who doesn't ask for your opinion or whatever.

and that was completely NOT what i got from him. Like i still remember that one scene of Mydei with his leo mentor.

It made me imagine(and headcannon) him as a bratty crowned warrior prince forced to grow up overnight.

and i like that more. Gives him dimension. Also Mydei seemed like a blunt but a reasonable and definitely not violent kind of guy to me. So I'll write him like that. Sorry if it's ooc in your eyes?

hope you enjoy :) drink water and remember not to spend too long on this site.
